name: Tap In Golf Bar Sussex Indoor Golf Simulators
about: Tap In Golf Bar Sussex Indoor Golf Simulators offers a premier indoor golf experience combined with a full-service sports bar, located in Sussex and Waukesha, Wisconsin. The facility utilizes Full Swing technology to provide an accurate simulation environment for golfers to practice their game, with leagues offered during fall, winter, and spring. The venue is designed as a social hub, featuring an open atmosphere with ample space for hanging out, making it suitable for both serious practice and casual outings with friends, family, or colleagues. In addition to its golf offerings, the venue provides a full-service bar and catering options, creating an all-in-one destination for entertainment, dining, and sports.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Full Swing technology provides accurate and easy-to-use simulations
Spacious layout allows for comfortable hanging out while playing
Indoor golf leagues available in fall, winter, and spring for regular play
Full-service bar enhances the social golf experience
Catering menu available for events, making it suitable for group outings

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen with specialty dishes, appetizers, and a separate catering menu for events
Full-service bar with specialty drinks and top-tier whiskey

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium technology providing accurate simulations for golf practice

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify whether club rentals are available, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs to ensure you have the equipment you need for your session.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a full-service bar and kitchen, offering food and drinks on-site. It does not mention a BYOB policy, so outside food and drinks may not be permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: For league play, teams have 1 hour and 15 minutes to complete 9 holes. For regular bookings, the time may vary, but the venue encourages booking specific time slots to maximize availability.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is kid-friendly, with a welcoming atmosphere and activities suitable for families, as mentioned in guest reviews and the general description of the venue.
